description: A modal containing a short description, form fields, and footer actions.

rules: Use the mapped modal node as the top-level component.
Use fixture labels for Input labels.
Treat fixture field values as design sample content, not runtime Input values.
Use secondary actions before primary actions.

generationRules: Use only props listed in the component contracts.
Do not hard-code design sample field values into Input value props.
Do not pass raw style objects, className, css, sx, or raw color props.
Represent layout through component structure instead of pixel-perfect CSS.
Run validate_generated_code before presenting generated React as usable.
